characters.name: Bernie Rubenstein
characters.description: Bernie RubensteinPhysical descriptionGenderMaleOther informationPlayed byRay XifoFirst appearanceLast appearance——  Bernie Rubensteinwas the director and choreographer ofRhapsody, the longest running show at theFan-Tan Hotel & Casino. He was something of a father figure for the hotel's entertainment director,Sandy Devereaux St. Clair. Rather elderly, he passes away duringGLOW's time at the hotel. The loss ofRhapsodyin the wake of his death prompts St. Clair to extend GLOW's run, originally from three months, until the end of the year. Eventually,Bash, the producer of GLOW, takes over the production ofRhapsodyas well.

characters.name: Tammé Dawson
characters.description: Tammé DawsonAliasesThe Welfare QueenPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleOther informationPlayed byKia StevensFirst appearanceLast appearance—— Tammé Dawsonis a character inGLOW. She is played byKia Stevens. Tammé's eldest son has just started at Stanford Medical School. In the ring, Tammé adopts the persona of The Welfare Queen, an angry black woman stereotype who wields food stamps. Her character thinks the general public is stupid for going out every day and working for the man, while she lets the government pay for everything and lives like a queen.

characters.name: Debbie Eagan
characters.description: Debbie EaganDebbie Eagan is a lesbian. She is married to Ruth Wilder, as of season 4.AliasesDeborah EaganLiberty BelleAffiliationGorgeous Ladies of WrestlingBiographical informationChildrenRandyPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleOther informationPlayed byBetty GilpinFirst appearanceLast appearancePilot— Deborah Eagan, normally known asDebbie Eagan, is one of the main characters ofGLOW, portrayed byBetty Gilpin. She wrestles under the nameLiberty Belle. Debbie Eagan is a new mother and former soap star. She joins theGorgeous Ladies of Wrestlingafter finding out that her husband,Mark, had an affair with her best friend,Ruth Wilder.

characters.name: Florian
characters.description: Florian is a 25 year old male with brown eyes and a brown, styled mullet. He is often seen wearing suit jackets and necklaces, sometimes in combination. Butler forSebastian HowardinSeason 1andSeason 2ofGLOW. The two have been friends since childhood and both have a keen interest in wrestling, which is partly what leads Bash to create theGorgeous Ladies of Wrestling. Flor leaves Bash at the beginning of season two after they get into an argument. After Flor leaves in season two, Bash goes looking for him. He ends up at a gay bar run by Flor's friend where it is fully revealed that Flor is queer. Although Bash doesn't find him here, the owner tells him that Flor talks about him often.

characters.name: Sebastian Howard
characters.description: Sebastian HowardAliasesBashAffiliationGorgeous Ladies of WrestlingBiographical informationMarital statusRhonda RichardsonPhysical descriptionGenderMaleOther informationPlayed byChris LowellFirst appearanceLast appearanceThe Wrath of Kuntar— Sebastian "Bash" Howardis a character inGLOW. He is played byChris Lowell. Sebastian "Bash" Howard is a millionaire playboy. His love of professional wrestling leads him to help fund theGorgeous Ladies of Wrestling. Bash comes into conflict withSam Sylviaover the presentation of the show. Where Sam is trying to create mythology and character, Bash wants fun and silly outfits. Despite asking Sam to create a different kind of wrestling show, he explains that he wanted it to be different only in the way that Ms. Pac-Man is different from Pac-Man - that she wears a bow. He asks Sam to rework the series and is pleased by what Sam comes up. ("The Wrath of Kuntar")
